text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to come across<n>Admire Vega
looking out towards the<n>central plaza. Following
her gaze, I<n>see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! O great sun!<n>Illuminate me
further with thy<n>brilliance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not right. Maybe a pose<n>like this would
better demonstrate the<n>sun's blessing? All right,
one more<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's observing T.M.<n>Opera O.
Later on the same day, I<n>catch sight of her
attempting a variety<n>of things around the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Get out, that's a lotta meat! Is today<n>your cheat
day or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No. I'm trying to put on some muscle.<n>A toned
core is pretty important for<n>photo shoots and
stuff. Anyway, I'm<n>gonna go get seconds.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Seconds? Of this? Oof...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Fifty-six... Fifty-seven... Come on!<n>Fifty-nine!
And... sixty!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Sitting on my legs... for two<n>hours straight...
they've gone<n>totally—hng...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...It looks so nice and fluffy. I need to<n>get my
hands on it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: If I study the plushie's smile, then<n>maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Every time I come across her, she<n>seems to
have her hands full.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On another day, I find her in the plaza<n>looking like
she's deep in thought yet<n>again. I can't help but
feel concerned,<n>so I walk up to her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Uh... Yeah. I'm fine.

Huh? Really? Even though you were<n>up late last
night mumbling to yourself<n>while scrolling through
your phone?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! This is about that modeling job to<n>make
posters for that inn, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Even if it is, staying up late isn't good<n>for you.
Everyone knows it's<n>super-duper bad for your
skin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I know.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I recall our meeting with the inn owner<n>the other
day. It seems that all her<n>actions up until now
were in<n>preparation for the photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, thinking back to how she<n>reacted that
day...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What?
choice_data_list:
I'm surprised, because you didn't seem all too
excited.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, I agreed to it, and a job is a job.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I'm to do this, then I want to do the<n>best I can.
That's all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... can I have some space, then?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Awww, looks like she gave us the<n>cold shoulder.
♪ Though I have to<n>say... it's kinda not fair.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That straightforward aloofness is her<n>greatest
weapon, and she doesn't<n>even realize it...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega does indeed have some<n>unusual
magnetism about the way<n>she carries herself.
